name: Volkswagen Maraton Praha
description: Czech Republic's flagship international marathon through the historic streets of Prague. Also includes a half marathon and a 4.4 km Run for Fun.

name: Sportisimo Prague Half Marathon
description: One of the world's most scenic half marathons, crossing the Vltava river multiple times.

name: Mattoni Karlovy Vary Half Marathon
description: Half marathon through the spa town of Karlovy Vary, part of the Mattoni Race Tour.

name: Mattoni Olomouc Half Marathon
description: Half marathon through Olomouc's historic UNESCO city centre.

name: Mattoni České Budějovice Half Marathon
description: Half marathon and 10 km race in the South Bohemian regional capital.

name: Mattoni Ústí nad Labem Half Marathon
description: Half marathon along the Elbe river in Ústí nad Labem.

name: Šumavský maraton
description: Mountain trail marathon through the Šumava national park forests and meadows.

name: Krkonošská 70
description: Demanding ultra trail race in the Giant Mountains with major elevation gain, climbing near Sněžka.

name: Beskydská sedmička
description: Legendary autumn/winter ultra trail run across the Beskydy mountain ridges, often in snow and mud.

name: Zlatá Praha
description: Traditional season-opening 10 km road race through central Prague, running since 1897.

name: Velikonoční desítka Kolín
description: Small local Easter 10K and 5K road race in Kolín, popular family event.

name: Devil's Race Kuks
description: Obstacle race (OCR) through forest, mud, and water obstacles near the Kuks chateau.

name: Spartan Race Czech - Sprint
description: Obstacle course race with 20+ obstacles on the slopes of Ještěd.

name: parkrun Stromovka
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning, open to all abilities. Recurs every Saturday.

name: parkrun Podyjí
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community trail run every Saturday morning along the Dyje river valley.

name: Běhej lesem Brdy
description: Small local forest trail race series in the Brdy hills, low-key and well-marked.

name: Noc na Karlštejně
description: Atmospheric night trail race finishing near Karlštejn castle.

name: Mikulášská desítka Pardubice
description: Local winter 10K road race with Santa/Mikuláš costumes encouraged, family-friendly.

name: Rakovnická zubačka
description: Small regional half marathon and 10.5K on forest and field paths near Rakovník.

name: Ostravská 22
description: City road race through Ostrava's industrial and modern districts.

name: parkrun Divoká Šárka
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning through the Divoká Šárka nature reserve.

name: parkrun Hostivař
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning around the Hostivař reservoir.

name: parkrun Brno - Podkomorské lesy
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning through forest trails near Brno.

name: parkrun Plzeň - Boleváček
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning around the Boleváček pond in Plzeň.

name: parkrun Liberec
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning in Liberec's Lidové sady park.

name: parkrun Hradec Králové
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning around Stříbrný rybník.

name: parkrun Ostrava - Bělský les
description: Free, weekly, timed 5 km community run every Saturday morning through Bělský les forest park.

name: Strakonická obecní běhánka
description: Tiny non-competitive town fun run organised by the local sports club, open to all ages, no timing chip required.

name: Vánoční běžka Třeboň
description: Small local Christmas-season run around the Třeboň fishponds, organised by the town recreation centre.

name: Novoroční výběh na Říp
description: Traditional New Year's Day uphill fun run to the summit of Říp hill, very informal, dozens of locals each year.

name: Memoriál Jana Zacha Humpolec
description: Small-town memorial road race including a kids' 1 km race, organised by the local athletics club since the 1970s.

name: Babí léto běžec Telč
description: Small autumn fun run around the historic ponds of Telč, organised by a local running club, very low-key.

name: Jarní probuzení Jindřichův Hradec
description: Tiny season-opening race around the town pond, run by a handful of local clubs and families, no entry fee.

name: Lesní běžec Křivoklát
description: Small forest trail race through the Křivoklát game reserve, capped at ~150 runners, run by volunteers.

name: Podzimní desítka Pelhřimov
description: Local autumn 10K through the streets of Pelhřimov, town of records, organised by the regional athletics union.

name: Litoměřický vinohradní běh
description: Small race through the vineyards above Litoměřice with views over the Elbe valley, harvest-festival atmosphere.

name: Zimní běžec Kralický Sněžník
description: Small winter trail race up toward Kralický Sněžník, sometimes run partly on snow, organised by local hikers' club.

name: Hanácká desítka Prostějov
description: Local 10K and 5K road race through Prostějov, popular with regional club runners and families.

name: Slovácký běžec Uherské Hradiště
description: Regional half marathon and 10K through Uherské Hradiště in the Moravian wine region.

name: Valašský trail Rožnov
description: Small Wallachian-region trail race climbing toward Radhošť, run by a local volunteer trail club.

name: Noční běžec Frýdek-Místek
description: Small evening/night fun run through the town centre with headlamps encouraged, family-friendly.

name: Jesenická padesátka
description: Small ultra-distance mountain trail race through the Jeseníky range, limited field, run by local volunteers.

name: Memoriál Emila Zátopka Kopřivnice
description: Small local race honouring Emil Zátopek's birthplace region, kids' race included, run by the town sports club.

name: Písecká patnáctka
description: Small local 15K and 7.5K road race along the Otava river in Písek, organised by a local running club.

name: Kutnohorský okruh
description: Small loop race past Kutná Hora's UNESCO sites, run by the local tourist club, low entry fee.
